# Natural Commit Message Examples
# Use these for more human-like git commits

## Bug Fixes
- fixed button click issue
- resolved mobile menu bug
- patched login error
- corrected data validation

## Features
- added role based permissions
- implemented responsive design
- created dashboard kpis
- built trip management system

## Improvements
- improved ui responsiveness
- updated table styles
- enhanced mobile layout
- refactored api calls

## Documentation
- added setup instructions
- updated readme
- wrote testing guide
- documented api endpoints

## Small Changes
- minor css tweaks
- updated dependencies
- cleaned up code
- fixed typos
